title: デビュー戦の後に・偉大なる1歩

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The spectators are enthralled by my running! With
a swarm of reporters in wait, I head to the press
conference room...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Only to find a single journalist... plus Doto! Alas,
the number of poor souls wallowing in an abyss of
despair, ignorant of my presence, appears far too
great!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
My next goal is clear—a rescue. With the
Overlord's gleaming stride, I will turn the nescient
masses into my fans!
